question: Largest scoring run in an NBA Finals game since 2009-10
notes: PLAN §12 row 10. Top 5 scoring runs in NBA Finals games since 2009-10. team_id 1610612744 = GSW (Golden State Warriors); 1610612742 = DAL (Dallas Mavericks); 1610612759 = SAS (San Antonio Spurs). Verified by direct query against data/nba.duckdb using the gaps-and-islands algorithm documented in pbp_aggregate/largest_scoring_run.sql. Ordering between tied run_points is by scoring_plays DESC then season_year DESC per the SQL.
